```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(quanteda)
  library(quanteda.textmodels)
  library(glmnet)
  library(LiblineaR)
  library(xgboost)
  library(lightgbm)
  library(Matrix)
  library(pROC)
})

set.seed(123)

# ============================================================
# Paths
# ============================================================
data_path    <- "../../data/processed_texts/600ad"
base_results <- "../../results/predictions/non_transformer_lemmatized/600ad"
results_path <- file.path(base_results, "temporal_stress_tests")
dir.create(results_path, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

hyper_candidates <- c(
  file.path(base_results, "model_hyperparameters_full.csv"),
  file.path(base_results, "model_hyperparameters_full(9).csv"),
  "model_hyperparameters_full.csv",
  "model_hyperparameters_full(9).csv"
)
hyper_path <- hyper_candidates[file.exists(hyper_candidates)][1]
if (is.na(hyper_path)) stop("Could not find model_hyperparameters_full.csv")

# ============================================================
# Settings
# ============================================================
min_docfreq <- 3L
max_calibration_folds <- 5L
min_calibration_rows <- 10L
min_glmnet_class <- 8L
min_bundle_per_class <- 2L * min_glmnet_class   # 16 with current settings

# windows are based on midpoint year
EARLY_MAX  <- 199
MID_MIN    <- 200
MID_MAX    <- 300
LATE_MIN   <- 301

# ============================================================
# Helpers
# ============================================================
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

ensure_dir <- function(path) {
  dir.create(path, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  invisible(path)
}

safe_prob <- function(p, eps = 1e-15) pmin(pmax(as.numeric(p), eps), 1 - eps)
safe_logit <- function(p, eps = 1e-15) qlogis(safe_prob(p, eps))

safe_bind <- function(x, proto) {
  if (length(x) == 0) proto else dplyr::bind_rows(x)
}

parse_historical_year <- function(x) {
  if (inherits(x, c("numeric", "integer"))) return(as.numeric(x))
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  out <- suppressWarnings(readr::parse_number(x_chr))
  is_bce <- stringr::str_detect(stringr::str_to_lower(x_chr), "\\b(bce|bc)\\b")
  out[is_bce & !is.na(out)] <- -abs(out[is_bce & !is.na(out)])
  out
}

year_to_century_index <- function(y) {
  out <- rep(NA_integer_, length(y))
  pos <- !is.na(y) & y >= 1
  neg <- !is.na(y) & y <= -1
  zer <- !is.na(y) & y == 0
  out[pos] <- ((as.integer(y[pos]) - 1L) %/% 100L) + 1L
  out[neg] <- -(((abs(as.integer(y[neg])) - 1L) %/% 100L) + 1L)
  out[zer] <- 1L
  out
}

century_label <- function(idx) {
  vapply(idx, function(z) {
    if (is.na(z)) return(NA_character_)
    if (z > 0) paste0(z, "c_CE") else paste0(abs(z), "c_BCE")
  }, character(1))
}

check_binary_y <- function(y, where = "") {
  tb <- table(y)
  if (!all(c("christian", "non_christian") %in% names(tb))) {
    stop(paste0("Both classes are required", if (nzchar(where)) paste0(" in ", where) else "", "."))
  }
  invisible(tb)
}

choose_calibration_k <- function(y, max_k = max_calibration_folds, min_train_class = min_glmnet_class) {
  tb <- table(y)
  if (!all(c("christian", "non_christian") %in% names(tb))) return(NA_integer_)
  n_min <- min(tb)
  candidates <- seq.int(2L, max_k)
  ok <- candidates[vapply(candidates, function(k) {
    n_min - ceiling(n_min / k) >= min_train_class
  }, logical(1))]
  if (length(ok) == 0) return(NA_integer_)
  max(ok)
}

make_folds <- function(y, k = max_calibration_folds, seed = 123) {
  check_binary_y(y, "cross-fitting")
  k_use <- choose_calibration_k(y, max_k = k, min_train_class = min_glmnet_class)
  if (!is.finite(k_use)) stop("Not enough observations per class for stable cross-fitting.")
  set.seed(seed)
  idx_pos <- sample(which(y == "christian"))
  idx_neg <- sample(which(y == "non_christian"))
  folds <- vector("list", k_use)
  for (i in seq_len(k_use)) folds[[i]] <- integer(0)
  for (i in seq_along(idx_pos)) folds[[((i - 1) %% k_use) + 1]] <- c(folds[[((i - 1) %% k_use) + 1]], idx_pos[i])
  for (i in seq_along(idx_neg)) folds[[((i - 1) %% k_use) + 1]] <- c(folds[[((i - 1) %% k_use) + 1]], idx_neg[i])
  folds
}

auc_safe <- function(y, p) {
  p <- safe_prob(p)
  tryCatch(
    as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(
      response = y,
      predictor = p,
      levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
      direction = "<",
      quiet = TRUE
    ))),
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )
}

log_loss_safe <- function(y, p) {
  p <- safe_prob(p)
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  -mean(y01 * log(p) + (1 - y01) * log(1 - p))
}

brier_safe <- function(y, p) {
  p <- safe_prob(p)
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  mean((y01 - p)^2)
}

hard_metrics <- function(y, pred_label) {
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  p01 <- as.integer(pred_label == "christian")
  tp <- sum(y01 == 1 & p01 == 1)
  tn <- sum(y01 == 0 & p01 == 0)
  fp <- sum(y01 == 0 & p01 == 1)
  fn <- sum(y01 == 1 & p01 == 0)
  precision <- if ((tp + fp) == 0) NA_real_ else tp / (tp + fp)
  recall <- if ((tp + fn) == 0) NA_real_ else tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- if ((tn + fp) == 0) NA_real_ else tn / (tn + fp)
  f1 <- if (is.na(precision) || is.na(recall) || (precision + recall) == 0) NA_real_ else 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
  bal_acc <- mean(c(recall, specificity), na.rm = TRUE)
  mcc_den <- sqrt((tp + fp) * (tp + fn) * (tn + fp) * (tn + fn))
  mcc <- if (mcc_den == 0) NA_real_ else ((tp * tn) - (fp * fn)) / mcc_den
  tibble(
    accuracy = (tp + tn) / length(y),
    balanced_accuracy = bal_acc,
    precision = precision,
    recall = recall,
    specificity = specificity,
    f1 = f1,
    mcc = mcc,
    tp = tp,
    tn = tn,
    fp = fp,
    fn = fn
  )
}

choose_threshold <- function(y, p, metric = c("youden", "f1")) {
  metric <- match.arg(metric)
  p <- safe_prob(p)
  if (metric == "youden") {
    th <- tryCatch(
      pROC::coords(
        pROC::roc(
          response = y,
          predictor = p,
          levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
          direction = "<",
          quiet = TRUE
        ),
        x = "best",
        input = "threshold",
        best.method = "youden",
        ret = "threshold",
        transpose = FALSE
      )[[1]],
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    )
    if (!is.finite(th)) 0.5 else as.numeric(th)
  } else {
    y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
    cand <- unique(c(0, sort(unique(p)), 0.5, 1))
    f1s <- vapply(cand, function(th) {
      pred01 <- as.integer(p >= th)
      tp <- sum(pred01 == 1 & y01 == 1)
      fp <- sum(pred01 == 1 & y01 == 0)
      fn <- sum(pred01 == 0 & y01 == 1)
      den <- 2 * tp + fp + fn
      if (den == 0) 0 else 2 * tp / den
    }, numeric(1))
    cand[which.max(f1s)]
  }
}

fit_platt <- function(scores, y) {
  z <- tibble(score = as.numeric(scores), y = as.integer(y == "christian")) %>%
    filter(is.finite(score))
  if (nrow(z) < min_calibration_rows || length(unique(z$score)) < 2 || length(unique(z$y)) < 2) return(NULL)
  suppressWarnings(
    tryCatch({
      fit <- glm(y ~ score, data = z, family = binomial(), control = glm.control(maxit = 200))
      b <- coef(fit)[["score"]]
      if (!is.finite(b) || b < 0 || abs(b) > 50) return(NULL)
      fit
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
  )
}

apply_platt <- function(platt, scores) {
  scores <- as.numeric(scores)
  if (is.null(platt)) {
    z <- as.numeric(scale(scores))
    z[!is.finite(z)] <- 0
    safe_prob(plogis(z))
  } else {
    safe_prob(predict(platt, newdata = data.frame(score = scores), type = "response"))
  }
}

make_counts_dfm <- function(text_data, stop_list) {
  quanteda::tokens(text_data, remove_punct = TRUE, remove_numbers = TRUE) %>%
    quanteda::tokens_remove(pattern = stop_list) %>%
    quanteda::dfm()
}

fit_vectorizer <- function(text_data, stop_list, min_df = min_docfreq) {
  x <- make_counts_dfm(text_data, stop_list)
  if (min_df > 1L) x <- quanteda::dfm_trim(x, min_docfreq = min_df, docfreq_type = "count")
  if (quanteda::nfeat(x) == 0) stop("No features remain after filtering.")
  N <- quanteda::ndoc(x)
  n_k <- quanteda::docfreq(x, scheme = "count")
  idf <- log((N + 1) / (n_k + 1)) + 1
  list(features = quanteda::featnames(x), idf = idf, min_df = min_df)
}

transform_counts_dfm <- function(text_data, vec, stop_list) {
  x <- make_counts_dfm(text_data, stop_list)
  quanteda::dfm_match(x, features = vec$features)
}

transform_tfidf_sparse <- function(text_data, vec, stop_list) {
  x_counts <- transform_counts_dfm(text_data, vec, stop_list)
  x_mat <- as(x_counts, "dgCMatrix")
  if (length(x_mat@x) > 0) x_mat@x <- 1 + log(x_mat@x)
  idf_vec <- vec$idf[match(colnames(x_mat), names(vec$idf))]
  idf_vec[is.na(idf_vec)] <- 0
  x_tfidf <- x_mat %*% Matrix::Diagonal(x = idf_vec)
  colnames(x_tfidf) <- colnames(x_mat)
  row_norms <- sqrt(Matrix::rowSums(x_tfidf^2))
  row_norms[row_norms == 0] <- 1
  x_tfidf <- x_tfidf / row_norms
  Matrix::drop0(x_tfidf)
}

prepare_features <- function(train_text, test_text, stop_list) {
  vec <- fit_vectorizer(train_text, stop_list)
  list(
    vec = vec,
    x_train_dfm = transform_counts_dfm(train_text, vec, stop_list),
    x_test_dfm  = transform_counts_dfm(test_text, vec, stop_list),
    x_train     = transform_tfidf_sparse(train_text, vec, stop_list),
    x_test      = transform_tfidf_sparse(test_text, vec, stop_list)
  )
}

muffle_sparse_warning <- function(expr) {
  withCallingHandlers(
    expr,
    warning = function(w) {
      msg <- conditionMessage(w)
      if (grepl("dgRMatrix", msg, fixed = TRUE) || grepl("Matrix-deprecated", msg, fixed = TRUE)) {
        invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
      }
    }
  )
}

svm_to_input <- function(x) {
  if (inherits(x, "matrix")) return(x)
  if (inherits(x, "sparseMatrix")) return(as(x, "dgCMatrix"))
  as.matrix(x)
}

read_hyper_table <- function(path) readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)

get_hparam_row <- function(tbl, aliases) {
  row <- tbl %>% filter(model %in% aliases) %>% slice(1)
  if (nrow(row) == 0) stop(paste0("Missing hyperparameter row for: ", paste(aliases, collapse = ", ")))
  row
}

summarise_metrics <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      model = character(),
      n_splits = integer(),
      mean_auc = double(),
      mean_log_loss = double(),
      mean_brier = double(),
      mean_bal_acc_youden = double(),
      mean_f1_youden = double(),
      mean_mcc_youden = double()
    ))
  }
  df %>%
    group_by(model) %>%
    summarise(
      n_splits = n(),
      mean_auc = mean(auc, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_log_loss = mean(log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_brier = mean(brier, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_bal_acc_youden = mean(balanced_accuracy_youden, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_f1_youden = mean(f1_youden, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_mcc_youden = mean(mcc_youden, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_auc))
}

# ============================================================
# Model-specific fit / predict
# ============================================================
hyper_tbl <- read_hyper_table(hyper_path)
hp_nb   <- get_hparam_row(hyper_tbl, c("naive_bayes"))
hp_enet <- get_hparam_row(hyper_tbl, c("elastic_net", "ridge"))
hp_svm  <- get_hparam_row(hyper_tbl, c("svm_platt"))
hp_xgb  <- get_hparam_row(hyper_tbl, c("xgboost"))
hp_lgb  <- get_hparam_row(hyper_tbl, c("lightgbm"))

model_names <- c("naive_bayes", "elastic_net", "svm_platt", "xgboost", "lightgbm")
model_label <- if (isTRUE(!is.na(hp_enet$alpha[1]) && hp_enet$alpha[1] > 0)) "elastic_net" else "ridge"

fit_model_from_features <- function(model_name, feats, y_train, seed = 123) {
  if (model_name == "naive_bayes") {
    fit <- quanteda.textmodels::textmodel_nb(feats$x_train_dfm, y_train)
    return(list(model_name = model_name, fit = fit, vec = feats$vec))
  }

  if (model_name == "elastic_net") {
    if (min(table(y_train)) < min_glmnet_class) stop("Elastic net requires at least 8 observations in the minority class.")
    alpha_use  <- dplyr::coalesce(hp_enet$alpha[1], 0)
    lambda_use <- dplyr::coalesce(hp_enet$lambda_1se[1], hp_enet$lambda_min[1])
    fit <- glmnet::glmnet(
      x = feats$x_train,
      y = as.integer(y_train == "christian"),
      family = "binomial",
      alpha = alpha_use,
      lambda = lambda_use,
      standardize = TRUE,
      maxit = 1e6
    )
    return(list(model_name = model_name, fit = fit, vec = feats$vec))
  }

  if (model_name == "svm_platt") {
    x_use <- svm_to_input(feats$x_train)
    fit <- muffle_sparse_warning(
      LiblineaR::LiblineaR(data = x_use, target = y_train, type = 7, cost = hp_svm$cost[1])
    )
    raw <- muffle_sparse_warning(
      predict(fit, x_use, decisionValues = TRUE)$decisionValues[, 1]
    )
    raw <- as.numeric(raw)
    sgn <- if (mean(raw[y_train == "christian"]) >= mean(raw[y_train == "non_christian"])) 1 else -1
    return(list(model_name = model_name, fit = fit, sign = sgn, vec = feats$vec))
  }

  if (model_name == "xgboost") {
    spw <- sum(y_train == "non_christian") / max(sum(y_train == "christian"), 1)
    pars <- list(
      booster = "gbtree",
      objective = "binary:logistic",
      eval_metric = "logloss",
      tree_method = "hist",
      eta = hp_xgb$eta[1],
      max_depth = as.integer(hp_xgb$max_depth[1]),
      min_child_weight = hp_xgb$min_child_weight[1],
      subsample = hp_xgb$subsample[1],
      colsample_bytree = hp_xgb$colsample_bytree[1],
      gamma = hp_xgb$gamma[1],
      scale_pos_weight = spw
    )
    if (!is.null(seed)) set.seed(seed)
    fit <- xgboost::xgb.train(
      params = pars,
      data = xgboost::xgb.DMatrix(feats$x_train, label = as.integer(y_train == "christian")),
      nrounds = as.integer(hp_xgb$best_nrounds[1]),
      verbose = 0
    )
    return(list(model_name = model_name, fit = fit, vec = feats$vec))
  }

  if (model_name == "lightgbm") {
    pars <- list(
      objective = "binary",
      metric = "binary_logloss",
      boosting = "gbdt",
      learning_rate = hp_lgb$learning_rate[1],
      num_leaves = as.integer(hp_lgb$num_leaves[1]),
      min_data_in_leaf = as.integer(hp_lgb$min_data_in_leaf[1]),
      feature_fraction = hp_lgb$feature_fraction[1],
      bagging_fraction = hp_lgb$bagging_fraction[1],
      bagging_freq = 1L,
      is_unbalance = TRUE,
      first_metric_only = TRUE,
      seed = seed,
      feature_fraction_seed = seed,
      bagging_seed = seed,
      verbosity = -1
    )
    dtrain <- lightgbm::lgb.Dataset(
      data = feats$x_train,
      label = as.integer(y_train == "christian"),
      params = list(feature_pre_filter = FALSE),
      free_raw_data = TRUE
    )
    fit <- lightgbm::lgb.train(
      params = pars,
      data = dtrain,
      nrounds = as.integer(hp_lgb$best_nrounds[1]),
      verbose = -1
    )
    return(list(model_name = model_name, fit = fit, vec = feats$vec, nrounds = as.integer(hp_lgb$best_nrounds[1])))
  }

  stop("Unknown model")
}

predict_model_score <- function(bundle, new_text, stop_list) {
  if (bundle$model_name == "naive_bayes") {
    x_new <- transform_counts_dfm(new_text, bundle$vec, stop_list)
    p <- predict(bundle$fit, newdata = x_new, type = "probability")
    p_ch <- if ("christian" %in% colnames(p)) p[, "christian"] else p[, ncol(p)]
    return(safe_logit(p_ch))
  }

  if (bundle$model_name == "elastic_net") {
    x_new <- transform_tfidf_sparse(new_text, bundle$vec, stop_list)
    return(as.numeric(predict(bundle$fit, newx = x_new, type = "link")))
  }

  if (bundle$model_name == "svm_platt") {
    x_new <- transform_tfidf_sparse(new_text, bundle$vec, stop_list)
    raw <- muffle_sparse_warning(
      predict(bundle$fit, svm_to_input(x_new), decisionValues = TRUE)$decisionValues[, 1]
    )
    return(bundle$sign * as.numeric(raw))
  }

  if (bundle$model_name == "xgboost") {
    x_new <- transform_tfidf_sparse(new_text, bundle$vec, stop_list)
    return(as.numeric(predict(bundle$fit, xgboost::xgb.DMatrix(x_new), outputmargin = TRUE)))
  }

  if (bundle$model_name == "lightgbm") {
    x_new <- transform_tfidf_sparse(new_text, bundle$vec, stop_list)
    out <- tryCatch(
      predict(bundle$fit, x_new, num_iteration = bundle$nrounds, type = "raw"),
      error = function(e) tryCatch(
        predict(bundle$fit, x_new, num_iteration = bundle$nrounds, rawscore = TRUE),
        error = function(e2) {
          p <- safe_prob(as.numeric(predict(bundle$fit, x_new, num_iteration = bundle$nrounds)))
          qlogis(p)
        }
      )
    )
    return(as.numeric(out))
  }

  stop("Unknown model")
}

crossfit_scores <- function(model_name, text, y, stop_list, seed = 123) {
  folds <- make_folds(y, max_calibration_folds, seed)
  out <- rep(NA_real_, length(y))
  for (j in seq_along(folds)) {
    va <- folds[[j]]
    tr <- setdiff(seq_along(y), va)
    feats <- prepare_features(text[tr], text[va], stop_list)
    bundle <- fit_model_from_features(model_name, feats, y[tr], seed = seed + j)
    out[va] <- predict_model_score(bundle, text[va], stop_list)
  }
  out
}

build_bundle <- function(model_name, train_df, stop_list, seed = 123) {
  y <- train_df$manual_label
  tb <- table(y)
  if (!all(c("christian", "non_christian") %in% names(tb))) return(NULL)
  if (any(tb < min_bundle_per_class)) return(NULL)

  cf_scores <- tryCatch(
    crossfit_scores(model_name, train_df$text, y, stop_list, seed = seed),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(cf_scores)) return(NULL)

  platt <- fit_platt(cf_scores, y)
  cf_prob <- apply_platt(platt, cf_scores)
  th_y <- choose_threshold(y, cf_prob, "youden")
  th_f <- choose_threshold(y, cf_prob, "f1")

  feats_full <- prepare_features(train_df$text, train_df$text, stop_list)
  fit_full <- tryCatch(
    fit_model_from_features(model_name, feats_full, y, seed = seed + 999),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(fit_full)) return(NULL)

  list(
    model_name = model_name,
    fit = fit_full$fit,
    vec = fit_full$vec,
    sign = fit_full$sign %||% NULL,
    nrounds = fit_full$nrounds %||% NULL,
    platt = platt,
    threshold_youden = th_y,
    threshold_f1 = th_f,
    train_scores_cf = cf_scores,
    train_prob_cf = cf_prob,
    train_n = nrow(train_df),
    train_pos = sum(y == "christian"),
    train_neg = sum(y == "non_christian")
  )
}

score_bundle <- function(bundle, test_df, stop_list) {
  raw <- predict_model_score(bundle, test_df$text, stop_list)
  prob <- apply_platt(bundle$platt, raw)
  pred_y <- ifelse(prob >= bundle$threshold_youden, "christian", "non_christian")
  pred_f <- ifelse(prob >= bundle$threshold_f1, "christian", "non_christian")
  list(raw = raw, prob = prob, pred_y = pred_y, pred_f = pred_f)
}

metric_proto <- tibble(
  split_id = character(),
  train_label = character(),
  test_label = character(),
  model = character(),
  train_n = integer(),
  train_pos = integer(),
  train_neg = integer(),
  test_n = integer(),
  test_pos = integer(),
  test_neg = integer(),
  auc = double(),
  log_loss = double(),
  brier = double(),
  accuracy_youden = double(),
  balanced_accuracy_youden = double(),
  precision_youden = double(),
  recall_youden = double(),
  specificity_youden = double(),
  f1_youden = double(),
  mcc_youden = double(),
  accuracy_f1 = double(),
  balanced_accuracy_f1 = double(),
  precision_f1 = double(),
  recall_f1 = double(),
  specificity_f1 = double(),
  f1_f1 = double(),
  mcc_f1 = double()
)

split_proto <- tibble(
  split_id = character(),
  train_label = character(),
  test_label = character(),
  train_n = integer(),
  train_pos = integer(),
  train_neg = integer(),
  test_n = integer(),
  test_pos = integer(),
  test_neg = integer(),
  train_ok = logical(),
  test_ok = logical(),
  note = character()
)

pred_proto <- tibble(
  split_id = character(),
  model = character(),
  id = character(),
  row_id = integer(),
  manual_label = character(),
  mid_year = double(),
  century = character(),
  prob = double(),
  raw_score = double(),
  pred_youden = character(),
  pred_f1 = character()
)

summarize_split <- function(split_id, train_label, test_label, train_df, test_df, model_name, scored) {
  hy <- hard_metrics(test_df$manual_label, scored$pred_y)
  hf <- hard_metrics(test_df$manual_label, scored$pred_f)
  tibble(
    split_id = split_id,
    train_label = train_label,
    test_label = test_label,
    model = ifelse(model_name == "elastic_net", model_label, model_name),
    train_n = nrow(train_df),
    train_pos = sum(train_df$manual_label == "christian"),
    train_neg = sum(train_df$manual_label == "non_christian"),
    test_n = nrow(test_df),
    test_pos = sum(test_df$manual_label == "christian"),
    test_neg = sum(test_df$manual_label == "non_christian"),
    auc = auc_safe(test_df$manual_label, scored$prob),
    log_loss = log_loss_safe(test_df$manual_label, scored$prob),
    brier = brier_safe(test_df$manual_label, scored$prob),
    accuracy_youden = hy$accuracy,
    balanced_accuracy_youden = hy$balanced_accuracy,
    precision_youden = hy$precision,
    recall_youden = hy$recall,
    specificity_youden = hy$specificity,
    f1_youden = hy$f1,
    mcc_youden = hy$mcc,
    accuracy_f1 = hf$accuracy,
    balanced_accuracy_f1 = hf$balanced_accuracy,
    precision_f1 = hf$precision,
    recall_f1 = hf$recall,
    specificity_f1 = hf$specificity,
    f1_f1 = hf$f1,
    mcc_f1 = hf$mcc
  )
}

# ============================================================
# Data loading
# ============================================================
custom_additions <- c("m", "c", "l", "d", "gt", "lt", "br", "href", "fridericus", "heinricus", "conradus", "meus", "tuus")
stops_v1 <- scan("../../data/stopwords/stopwords_latin1.txt", what = "character", quiet = TRUE, encoding = "UTF-8")
stops_v2 <- scan("../../data/stopwords/stopwords_latin2.txt", what = "character", comment.char = "#", quiet = TRUE, encoding = "UTF-8")
latin_stops <- sort(unique(c(stops_v1, stops_v2, custom_additions)))
latin_stops <- latin_stops[latin_stops != "*"]

df <- readr::read_csv(file.path(data_path, "corpus_600ad.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(text) & text != "") %>%
  mutate(row_id = row_number())

labels <- readr::read_csv(file.path(data_path, "corpus_600ad_labeled.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
  filter(label %in% c("christian", "non_christian")) %>%
  transmute(id, manual_label = label) %>%
  distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE)

lab <- df %>%
  inner_join(labels, by = "id") %>%
  arrange(row_id) %>%
  mutate(
    start_year = parse_historical_year(date_range_start),
    end_year   = parse_historical_year(date_range_end)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    start_year0 = start_year,
    end_year0 = end_year,
    start_year = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(start_year0) & !is.na(end_year0), pmin(start_year0, end_year0), start_year0),
    end_year   = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(start_year0) & !is.na(end_year0), pmax(start_year0, end_year0), end_year0)
  ) %>%
  select(-start_year0, -end_year0) %>%
  mutate(
    mid_year = if_else(!is.na(start_year) & !is.na(end_year), (start_year + end_year) / 2, NA_real_),
    century_index = year_to_century_index(mid_year),
    century = century_label(century_index)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(mid_year), !is.na(century_index))

if (nrow(lab) == 0) stop("No labeled rows have usable midpoint dates.")
check_binary_y(lab$manual_label, "full labeled corpus")

readr::write_csv(
  lab %>% select(id, row_id, manual_label, date_range_start, date_range_end, start_year, end_year, mid_year, century_index, century),
  file.path(results_path, "labeled_date_assignment.csv")
)
readr::write_csv(hyper_tbl, file.path(results_path, "hyperparameters_used.csv"))

century_counts <- lab %>%
  count(century_index, century, manual_label, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(century_index, manual_label)
readr::write_csv(century_counts, file.path(results_path, "century_label_counts.csv"))

# ============================================================
# Explicit temporal stress tests
# ============================================================
stress_specs <- list(
  list(
    split_id = "train_pre200_test_post300",
    train_label = paste0("mid_year <= ", EARLY_MAX),
    test_label  = paste0("mid_year >= ", LATE_MIN),
    train_fn = function(d) d$mid_year <= EARLY_MAX,
    test_fn  = function(d) d$mid_year >= LATE_MIN
  ),
  list(
    split_id = "train_post300_test_pre200",
    train_label = paste0("mid_year >= ", LATE_MIN),
    test_label  = paste0("mid_year <= ", EARLY_MAX),
    train_fn = function(d) d$mid_year >= LATE_MIN,
    test_fn  = function(d) d$mid_year <= EARLY_MAX
  ),
  list(
    split_id = "train_pre300_test_post300",
    train_label = "mid_year < 300",
    test_label  = paste0("mid_year >= ", LATE_MIN),
    train_fn = function(d) d$mid_year < MID_MAX,
    test_fn  = function(d) d$mid_year >= LATE_MIN
  ),
  list(
    split_id = "train_post300_test_pre300",
    train_label = paste0("mid_year >= ", LATE_MIN),
    test_label  = "mid_year < 300",
    train_fn = function(d) d$mid_year >= LATE_MIN,
    test_fn  = function(d) d$mid_year < MID_MAX
  ),
  list(
    split_id = "train_post300_test_200_300",
    train_label = paste0("mid_year >= ", LATE_MIN),
    test_label  = paste0(MID_MIN, " <= mid_year <= ", MID_MAX),
    train_fn = function(d) d$mid_year >= LATE_MIN,
    test_fn  = function(d) d$mid_year >= MID_MIN & d$mid_year <= MID_MAX
  ),
  list(
    split_id = "train_pre200_test_200_300",
    train_label = paste0("mid_year <= ", EARLY_MAX),
    test_label  = paste0(MID_MIN, " <= mid_year <= ", MID_MAX),
    train_fn = function(d) d$mid_year <= EARLY_MAX,
    test_fn  = function(d) d$mid_year >= MID_MIN & d$mid_year <= MID_MAX
  ),
  list(
    split_id = "train_200_300_test_post300",
    train_label = paste0(MID_MIN, " <= mid_year <= ", MID_MAX),
    test_label  = paste0("mid_year >= ", LATE_MIN),
    train_fn = function(d) d$mid_year >= MID_MIN & d$mid_year <= MID_MAX,
    test_fn  = function(d) d$mid_year >= LATE_MIN
  ),
  list(
    split_id = "train_200_300_test_pre200",
    train_label = paste0(MID_MIN, " <= mid_year <= ", MID_MAX),
    test_label  = paste0("mid_year <= ", EARLY_MAX),
    train_fn = function(d) d$mid_year >= MID_MIN & d$mid_year <= MID_MAX,
    test_fn  = function(d) d$mid_year <= EARLY_MAX
  )
)

split_rows <- list()
metric_rows <- list()
pred_rows <- list()
run_log <- list()

split_counter <- 1L
metric_counter <- 1L
pred_counter <- 1L
log_counter <- 1L

for (sp in stress_specs) {
  train_df <- lab[sp$train_fn(lab), , drop = FALSE]
  test_df  <- lab[sp$test_fn(lab), , drop = FALSE]

  train_tb <- table(train_df$manual_label)
  test_tb  <- table(test_df$manual_label)

  train_ok <- all(c("christian", "non_christian") %in% names(train_tb)) && all(train_tb[c("christian", "non_christian")] >= min_bundle_per_class)
  test_ok  <- all(c("christian", "non_christian") %in% names(test_tb))

  note <- dplyr::case_when(
    nrow(train_df) == 0 ~ "empty_train_set",
    nrow(test_df) == 0  ~ "empty_test_set",
    !test_ok            ~ "test_set_missing_one_class",
    !train_ok           ~ paste0("train_set_needs_at_least_", min_bundle_per_class, "_per_class_for_stable_crossfit"),
    TRUE                ~ "ok"
  )

  split_rows[[split_counter]] <- tibble(
    split_id = sp$split_id,
    train_label = sp$train_label,
    test_label = sp$test_label,
    train_n = nrow(train_df),
    train_pos = sum(train_df$manual_label == "christian"),
    train_neg = sum(train_df$manual_label == "non_christian"),
    test_n = nrow(test_df),
    test_pos = sum(test_df$manual_label == "christian"),
    test_neg = sum(test_df$manual_label == "non_christian"),
    train_ok = train_ok,
    test_ok = test_ok,
    note = note
  )
  split_counter <- split_counter + 1L

  if (!(train_ok && test_ok)) next

  for (m in model_names) {
    bundle <- build_bundle(m, train_df, latin_stops, seed = 1000 + 100 * split_counter + match(m, model_names))
    if (is.null(bundle)) {
      run_log[[log_counter]] <- tibble(
        split_id = sp$split_id,
        model = ifelse(m == "elastic_net", model_label, m),
        status = "skipped",
        note = "bundle_construction_failed"
      )
      log_counter <- log_counter + 1L
      next
    }

    scored <- tryCatch(
      score_bundle(bundle, test_df, latin_stops),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(scored)) {
      run_log[[log_counter]] <- tibble(
        split_id = sp$split_id,
        model = ifelse(m == "elastic_net", model_label, m),
        status = "skipped",
        note = "prediction_failed"
      )
      log_counter <- log_counter + 1L
      next
    }

    metric_rows[[metric_counter]] <- summarize_split(
      split_id = sp$split_id,
      train_label = sp$train_label,
      test_label = sp$test_label,
      train_df = train_df,
      test_df = test_df,
      model_name = m,
      scored = scored
    )
    metric_counter <- metric_counter + 1L

    pred_rows[[pred_counter]] <- tibble(
      split_id = sp$split_id,
      model = ifelse(m == "elastic_net", model_label, m),
      id = test_df$id,
      row_id = test_df$row_id,
      manual_label = test_df$manual_label,
      mid_year = test_df$mid_year,
      century = test_df$century,
      prob = scored$prob,
      raw_score = scored$raw,
      pred_youden = scored$pred_y,
      pred_f1 = scored$pred_f
    )
    pred_counter <- pred_counter + 1L

    run_log[[log_counter]] <- tibble(
      split_id = sp$split_id,
      model = ifelse(m == "elastic_net", model_label, m),
      status = "ok",
      note = ""
    )
    log_counter <- log_counter + 1L
  }
}

stress_split_counts <- safe_bind(split_rows, split_proto)
stress_metrics <- safe_bind(metric_rows, metric_proto)
stress_predictions <- safe_bind(pred_rows, pred_proto)
stress_run_log <- safe_bind(run_log, tibble(split_id = character(), model = character(), status = character(), note = character()))
stress_summary <- summarise_metrics(stress_metrics)

readr::write_csv(stress_split_counts, file.path(results_path, "stress_test_split_counts.csv"))
readr::write_csv(stress_metrics, file.path(results_path, "stress_test_metrics.csv"))
readr::write_csv(stress_summary, file.path(results_path, "stress_test_summary.csv"))
readr::write_csv(stress_predictions, file.path(results_path, "stress_test_predictions.csv"))
readr::write_csv(stress_run_log, file.path(results_path, "stress_test_run_log.csv"))

cat("\nStress-test split counts:\n")
print(stress_split_counts, n = Inf)
cat("\nStress-test summary:\n")
print(stress_summary, n = Inf)

```
